Figure 12.3 - From Assistant To Action Surface. Anthropic's computer-use, MCP, and Claude Code materials show a move toward tool-connected assistants, with permissions and review as part of the system.

Figure 12.4 - The Tempting Claude Claims Are Not The Sourced Ones. Vendor launch pages and docs can show product direction, but outcome claims need benchmark, pricing, adoption, productivity, and safety evidence at the same scope.

Figure 17.1 - Tokenization Ladder. Human text becomes subword pieces, token IDs, context budget, and next-token prediction target.
Figure 17.2 - Web Corpus Filter Funnel. Common Crawl style data becomes a training-mixture candidate through filtering, deduplication, and documentation decisions.

Figure 18.1 - RAG Evidence Conveyor. Retrieval, ranking, context packing, generation, citation, and audit gates with failure labels.
Figure 18.2 - Function-Call Boundary. The model proposes typed calls; application validation, permissions, execution, and logging decide what happens.
Figure 18.3 - Agent Loop as Harness. Plan, act, observe, gate, context, and review form a bounded system loop.

Figure 23.1 - Failure Modes Are Different Claims. Hallucination/truth, sycophancy, adversarial, proxy, evidence, and measurement failures are separate evidence lanes.
Figure 23.2 - Trust Is A Stack. Evidence selection, evidence use, authority, evaluation, permission/action, and audit memory form layered controls.
Figure 23.3 - Every Evaluation Casts A Shadow. TruthfulQA, Arena preference, SWE-bench, and LiveCodeBench each illuminate a scoped slice and leave blind spots.
Figure 23.4 - From Answer To Auditable Claim. Question, retrieval, generation, audit, blocker, record, and publish steps separate fluent output from scoped evidence.
Figure 24.1 - From Next Token To Computing Stack. Next-token prediction is surrounded by data, architecture, training, products, tools, infrastructure, economics, and trust.
Figure 24.2 - Five Conversion Gates. Prediction-to-interface, interface-to-product, model-to-platform, compute-to-infrastructure, and fluency-to-trust are shown as overlapping pressures.
Figure 24.3 - Unsettled By The Cutoff. Tempting end-of-book claims are paired with the same-scope evidence still required.
Figure 24.4 - Human Judgment Loop. User intent, model tokens, tools, evidence trace, audit, blockers, and human decision form the closing loop.
